title: DOITOOL Stainless Steel Yukihira Pan Traditional Japanese Saucepan with Wood Handle Milk Sauce Pan for Ramen Tempura Milk 20cm
features: 🥛【 Material】This milk pot is made of premium stainless steel, no chemical coating to cover, no need to worry about the coating falling off at high temperature
🥛【Ergonomic Handle】Sturdy wooden handle with excellent durability, the long handle is firmly riveted to provide a firm, firm and comfortable grip

🥛【Professional Cooking】The saucepan has a built-in scale line to control the amount of water added and improve cooking efficiency. Pouring lips on the left and right sides of the pot, so that the soup is not easy to spill
🥛【Even Heat Distribution】Specially constructed base with stainless steel encapsulation that avoids heat spots and distributes heat evenly, saving energy
🥛【Multipurpose】Heats up extremely fast and is great for ramen, tempura, milk, sauces, syrup, and so much more! Easy to clean,suitable for both induction cooker and gas stove.
description: Description Suitable for All Stove – Including induction, heat evenly and quickly. Wood Effect Handle – The Bakelite handle are comfortable to grip and stay cool while cooking. Designed with two- sided pour spouts for pouring from either side, which also allow the soup or milk to pour smoothly and avoid spilling Features - Material: Stainless steel. - Color: Silver. - Size: about 38. 5X18X8. 5CM. - Size: about 41X20X8. 7CM. - Size: about 43X22X8. 8CM. Package Including 1 x Milk Pot
